title: Romance of the Underworld
writer: Paul Armstrong, Douglas Z. Doty, Garrett Graham
actors: Mary Astor, Ben Bard, Robert Elliott
plot: When a gangster's speakeasy is raided by the police, one of the people picked up is the gangster's pretty young girlfriend. A kind-hearted cop takes pity on her and helps her get out of that life. While waitressing to earn money f...
